title: Classic Italian-Style Beef Roast
description: A traditional Italian beef roast recipe, slow-cooked to perfection. The result is a tender and flavorful dish that's perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: 2. Season the beef roast with salt, black pepper, and dried oregano.
3. Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
4. Sear the beef roast until browned on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
5. Remove the beef from the pot and set it aside.
6. Add the sliced beef to the pot and cook until browned, about 2-3 minutes.
7. Add the garlic, red wine, and beef broth to the pot.
8. Return the beef roast to the pot and bring the liquid to a simmer.
9. Cover the pot with a lid and transfer it to the preheated oven.
10. Braise the beef for 2-3 hours, or until it reaches your desired level of tenderness.
11. Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool slightly.
12. Slice the beef against the grain and serve with the juices from the pot.
